title: Gebokste Liefde
overview: Suma-Lee is a divorced single mom who is already struggling when she loses her job as a fashion designer and on top of that hears her slimy ex-husband is getting hitched again – with a model. Overwhelmed by anger, she reluctantly starts taking boxing lessons and finds herself stumbling into new love. She falls hard for Clive, her boxing coach, but his life is just as messy as hers. They have to decide: flee or fight for love?
